ksa_text: Skill in preprocessing, transforming, and normalizing data for analysis, including format conversion, data cleansing, joining disparate sources, handling missing values, and creating standard data representations.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge case — excluded on balance: skill from Analytics & BI (domain affinity 0.28); strategic/governance framing outweighs technical signals. STRM composite score is moderate-to-strong (0.3965). A working DE would be aware of but not accountable for this competency.
